---
name: Wiki health check
about: Run a periodic wiki health lint pass over durable artifacts.
title: "[Health] "
labels: maintenance,review
assignees: ""
---

## Scope

- Date or period:
- Workstream or area:
- Included artifacts:

## Mechanical Checks

- `python3 tools/validate_repo.py`:
- `python3 tools/validate_repo.py --health-report`:
- Search queries used:

## Manual Review Categories

- Contradictory claims:
- Stale claims:
- Unresolved `needs-review` / `conflicted` items:
- Orphan pages:
- Missing concept pages:
- Missing source support:
- Duplicated or overlapping notes:

## Outputs

- Review artifact:
- Follow-up issues:
- Workstream updates:

## Validation

- Health review links back to affected artifacts.
- Follow-up uncertainty is explicit.
